titleStmt.title: SII 25.212: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 212. (A.R. No. 212 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North base of the verandah in the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This epigraph can palaeographically be assigned to the 13th century.

It records the grant of mā-kāṇi-araikkāṇi lands at Śiṅgaḷāntanallūr by four individuals as tirunāmattukkāṇi to the deity Tiru-Uśāttānam-uḍaiyanāyaṉār. The above lands are stated to have been made over as iṟaiyili to the deity for the purpose of providing food-offerings, at the request of mudaliyār Poṉṉaya[m*]ba-nambi and tāṉattār of the temple. The decision was taken by the assembly of the temple of Irājarāja-īśvaram (Irārā-īśvaram) of Śiṅgaḷāntanallūr, a hamlet (piḍāgai) of Suttavallich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraṟśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The lands granted as tirunāmattukkāṇi are half mā each by Tiruvaiyāṟaḍigaḷ-bhaṭṭaṉ of Poṉṉampuṟam and Tillaināyaka-bhaṭṭaṉ of Kuṇḍūr, thus totally one mā of cultivable land in the south-east of the village and kāṇi-araikkāṇi of garden lands called Śīrāttōṭṭam-nilam in the south-east of the lands on the eastern bank of Muḷḷivāy-āṟu (inclusive of araikkāṇi-mundirigai lands given by Śrī Mādēva-bhaṭṭaṉ and araikkāṇi-mundirigai lands given by Piḷḷainambibhaṭṭaṉ). Among the boundaries of the garden lands endowed are mentioned Śōḻakulasundara-vadi in the west and Muḍigoṇḍaśōḻa-vadi in the north. The paddy in maḍakku from the classified lands was made over as iṟaiyili to the temple.

The place Suttavallich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam referred to here is different from the village Suttavalli alias Vīravinōdach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Mēlvemba-nāḍu referred to in the records from Tirunelveli temple (cf. S.I.I., Vol. V, No. 421, line 25)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīrācentira coḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu 10vatu Irācentira coḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampaiṉāṭṭu śrīcuttavallic caruppeti maṅkalattu piṭākai ciṅkaḷānta nallūr Irārā Īśvara kūṭṭap tu nammūr kaṇakku kāma kūṭal Uṭaivaraiyum kājanapparayaṉ kaṇṭu Uṭaiyār tiruucāttāna Uṭaiyanāyaṉārkku tirunā
mattukkāṇi Ākakkuṭutta kuṇṭur tillai nāyaka paṭṭaṉum poṉṉampuṟattu tiruvaiyāṟaṭikaḷppiramaṉum kuṇṭur śrīmātevapaṭṭaṉum kuṇṭur piḷḷai nampipaṭṭaṉum tirunāmattukkāṇi Ākak kuṭutta Ivvūrc cemayaṉ māteva vatikkuk kiḻakku Aṟiñcaya vāykkālukku vaṭakku Eṭṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟu muṉṟāñcatirattu meṟkkaṭaiya nilam Orumānikki teṉkiḻakku
poṉṉam puṟattu tiruvaiyāṟaṭikaḷ paṭṭaṉ kuṭutta nilam Araimāvum teṉkiḻakku kuṇṭur tillai nāyakapaṭṭaṉ kuṭutta nilam Araimāvum Āka viḷai nilam Orumāvum coḻakula cuntaravatikku kiḻakku muṭikoṇṭa coḻavatikku teṟkku mutal kaṇṇāṟṟu mutal catarattuppaṭi muḷḷivāy Āṟukkuk kiḻkarai Uṭpaṭṭa nilattu teṉkiḻakkuc cīrāt
toṭṭam nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi Itil teṟkkaṭaiya śrīmāteva paṭṭaṉ kuṭutta nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum vaṭakkaṭaiya piḷḷai nampi paṭṭaṉ kuṭutta nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Ākat toṭṭam nilam turavukaḷil Opāti Uṟpaṭak kuṭuttamaiyil Āka rūpāy 1mā 1kāṇiø Innilam mākāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Iṉṉāya
ṉārkku tirunāmattukkāṇi Ākak kuṭuttom Iṉṉilam Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭikku Uṭalāka Iṟaiyili ceytu taraveṇum Eṉṟu mutaliyār poṉṉayampala nampiy Aruḷic ceytu tāṉattārum collukaiyil Iṉnilattāl tarappaṭi maṭakkāluḷḷa nellu Ivvāṇṭu mutal cantirā—
Āka kuṭuttamaiyil Iṉṉilattāl nellum—
tu Iṉṉāyaṉārkku Iṟaiyili Āṉapaṭik—
tu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur—
m Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur nārāyaṇapaṭṭa—Unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 25.212 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
